integration.note: run-config route round-trip via the REAL reader (mode passthrough + unrecognised-drop), within the server vitest suite

e2e.note: No browser surface in W1 — mode drives no UI yet (W3) and the marker is consumed by the monorepo /shipwright-run (W2). Cross-surface Playwright E2E is the campaign's W4 sub-iterate. F0.5 ran surface=cli instead (see surface_verification).

surface_verification.runner: cmd /c server\node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --root server run-config-mode pty-env-flicker run-config-route

behaviors.behavior: AC1 server mirror: RunMode/RUN_MODES/DEFAULT_RUN_MODE + resolveRunMode (present->itself, absent->multi_session) + isRunMode
AC1 client mirror: same helpers exported + correct (mirrors never import each other, own coverage)
AC2 reader surfaces a valid mode (single_session / multi_session), no warning
AC2 reader omits mode when absent OR null, no warning
behaviors.evidence: server/src/core/run-config-mode.test.ts 'omits mode when absent' + 'treats mode=null like absent' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC2 reader drops an unrecognised mode + warns, NEVER rejects the config
behaviors.evidence: server/src/core/run-config-mode.test.ts 'drops an unrecognised mode + warns; config still ok' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC3 run-config route surfaces a valid mode end-to-end (real reader through Hono)
AC3 run-config route: unrecognised mode dropped+warned, route still 200/ok
behaviors.evidence: server/src/external/run-config-route.test.ts 'unrecognised mode -> dropped + warned, route still 200/ok' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC4 buildSpawnEnv sets SHIPWRIGHT_WEBUI=1 by default (and in the legacy brand-colors path)
behaviors.evidence: server/src/terminal/pty-env-flicker.test.ts 'sets SHIPWRIGHT_WEBUI=1 by default' + 'legacy brand-colors path' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC4 SHIPWRIGHT_WEBUI marker is authoritative: neither base env nor caller can override/unset it
behaviors.evidence: server/src/terminal/pty-env-flicker.test.ts 'overrides a stale...inherited' + 'a caller cannot override or unset the marker' PASSED
